revision.comment: Bot: migrate talk page structure; import discussion seed (en:Haji clan); add local discussion section + dated import note

[[Project:History cleanup|Offloading history due to miraheze stability concerns]] many contributors, see [https://emmaleonhart.github.io/shintowiki-scripts/wikihistory.html?page=Haji_clan here] for full history [[github:EmmaLeonhart/shintowiki-scripts/actions/runs/24756154998|commit triggered pipeline]]
revision.text:
{{talk page header}} == Local discussion == :Dummy comment added by script to avoid immediate auto-archive of a fresh page.[[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 03:48, 26 February 2026 (UTC) == Imported from English Wikipedia (2026-02-26, [https://en.wikipedia.org/wiki/Special:PermanentLink/1207511985 revision]) == :Dummy comment added by script to avoid immediate auto-archive of a fresh page.[[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 03:48, 26 February 2026 (UTC) {{WikiProject banner shell |class=Start|1= {{WikiProject Articles for creation|ts=20220711173054|reviewer=Missvain|oldid=1087506162}} {{WikiProject Genealogy |importance=Low |infobox=yes}} {{WikiProject Japan|importance=Low|culture=yes}} }} == Family tree == Can we try to translate the family tree here? It is unwieldy to translate but also important for the article [[User:SiliconProphet|SiliconProphet]] ([[User talk:SiliconProphet|talk]]) 02:14, 11 October 2021 (UTC) {{Family tree/start}} {{Familytree|001||||||||||001=[[アメノホヒ|天之菩卑能命]]}} {{Familytree||)|-|-|-|.|||||||}} {{Familytree|001||002||||||||001=[[建比良鳥命]]|002=伊努比売命}} {{Familytree||)|-|-|-|.|||||||}} {{Familytree|001||002||||||||001=[[伊佐我命]]|002=[[出雲建子命]]}} {{Familytree||!||||!|||||||}} {{Familytree|001||002||||||||001=[[津狡命]]|002=神狭命}} {{Familytree||!|||||||||||}} {{Familytree|001||||||||||001=[[櫛瓱前命]]}} {{Familytree||!|||||||||||}} {{Familytree|001||||||||||001=[[櫛月命]]}} {{Familytree||!|||||||||||}} {{Familytree|001||||||||||001=[[櫛瓱鳥海命]]}} {{Familytree||!|||||||||||}} {{Familytree|001||||||||||001=[[櫛田命]]}} {{Familytree||!|||||||||||}} {{Familytree|001||||||||||001=[[知理命]]}} {{Familytree||!|||||||||||}} {{Familytree|001||||||||||001=[[毛呂須命]]}} {{Familytree||!|||||||||||}} {{Familytree|001||||||||||001=[[阿多命]]}} {{Familytree||)|-|-|-|v|-|-|-|.|||}} {{Familytree|001||002||003||||001=[[出雲振根命]]|002=[[飯入根命]]|003=[[甘美乾飯根命]]}} {{Familytree||!||||!||||!|||}} {{Familytree|001||002||003||001=小振根命|002=[[宇迦都久怒命]]
（定賜[[出雲国造]]）|003=[[野見宿禰]]
（[[垂仁天皇|垂仁朝]]為土師職、賜'''土師臣'''姓）}} {{Familytree||!||||,|-|-|-|(|||}} {{Familytree|001||002||003||001=美止耶命
（朝原臣祖）|002=[[土師阿多勝|阿陀勝臣]]|003=三熊臣
（出雲高草臣、秋鹿臣等祖）}} {{Familytree||||||)|-|-|-|.|||}} {{Familytree|||||001||002||001=[[土師磐毘|磐毘臣]]|002=小熊臣
（民直祖）}} {{Familytree||||||!|||||||}} {{Familytree|||||001||||001=[[土師身臣|身臣]]
（[[仁徳天皇|仁徳朝]]為'''土師連'''供奉）}} {{Familytree||||||)|-|-|-|.|||}} {{Familytree|||||001||002||001=[[土師意富祖婆|意富祖婆連]]
（[[反正天皇|反正朝]]供奉）|002=布須古連
（居于[[河内国]]石津原）}} {{Familytree||,|-|-|-|+|-|-|-|.|||}} {{Familytree|001||002||003||001=[[土師小鳥|小鳥連]]
（[[雄略天皇|雄略朝]]供奉、雄略九年五月紀）|002=[[土師吾笥|吾笥連]]
（同十七年三月紀、居于[[伊勢国]]贄'''土師連'''祖）|003=水鶏連}} {{Familytree||!||||!||||!|||}} {{Familytree|001||002||003||001=[[土師咋子|咋子連]]
（[[継体天皇|継体朝]]供奉）|002=米子連|003=川名連
（[[凡河内氏|凡河内忌寸]]祖）}} {{Familytree||)|-|-|-|.|||||||}} {{Familytree|001||002||||||001=[[土師大保度|大保度連]]
（[[欽明天皇|欽明朝]]供奉）|002=伊知良連
（居[[河内国]][[志紀郡|志紀縣]]）}} {{Familytree||!||||!|||||||}} {{Familytree|001||002||||||001=[[土師首|首連]]|002=阿世連
（[[宣化天皇|宣化朝]]供奉、恵我宿禰祖）}} {{Familytree||)|-|-|-|v|-|-|-|.|||}} {{Familytree|001||002||003||001=[[土師兎|兎連]]|002=[[土師八嶋|八嶋連]]
（[[用明天皇|用明朝]]、[[崇峻天皇|崇峻朝]]、[[推古天皇|推古朝]]供奉）|003=[[土師兄国|兄国連]]}} {{Familytree||!||||!||||!|||}} {{Familytree|001||002||003||001=[[土師土徳|土徳連]]|002=[[土師身|身連]]|003=[[土師真敷|真敷連]]}} {{Familytree||!||||!||||!|||}} {{Familytree|001||002||003||001=[[土師富杼]]|002=[[土師根麻呂]]
（[[天武天皇|天武朝]]十三年十二月改姓連、賜'''土師宿禰'''姓）|003=[[土師弟麻呂]]}} {{Familytree||!||||!||||!|||}} {{Familytree|001||002||003||001=[[土師祖麻呂]]|002=[[土師甥]]|003=[[土師百村]]}} {{Familytree||!||||!||||!|||}} {{Familytree|001||002||003||001=[[土師和麿]]|002=[[土師宇庭]]|003=[[土師千村]]}} {{Familytree||!||||!||||!|||}} {{Familytree|001||002||003||001=[[大枝諸上]]|002=[[菅原古人]]|003=[[秋篠安人]]}} {{Familytree||!||||!||||!|||}} {{Familytree|001||002||003||001=〔'''[[大江氏]]'''〕|002=〔'''[[菅原氏]]'''〕|003=〔'''[[秋篠氏]]'''〕}} {{Family tree/end}} : It is difficult to translate, and also largely irrelevant to the article. Given that we also don't have articles about most of the names listed, and likely won't (since many of these likely fail notability requirements for English-language readers), I don't expect that this will be added to the article any time soon. ‑‑ [[User:Eirikr|Eiríkr Útlendi]] │''[[User talk:Eirikr|Tala við mig]]'' 22:40, 20 July 2022 (UTC) :Dummy comment added by script to avoid immediate auto-archive of a fresh page.[[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 03:48, 26 February 2026 (UTC)
